challenges.title: Select and Radio Inputs
challenges.description: Create a form with a <select> dropdown containing at least three <option> elements and a group of at least three radio buttons (<input type="radio">) sharing the same name attribute. Include labels and a submit button. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a form with select dropdown and radio buttons -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '<form' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <form> tag'
assert '<select' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <select> dropdown'
assert '</select>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </select> tag'
assert html.lower().count('<option') >= 3, 'Should contain at least three <option> elements'
assert 'type="radio"' in html.lower() or "type='radio'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain radio button inputs'
assert html.lower().count('type="radio"') + html.lower().count("type='radio'") >= 3, 'Should contain at least three radio buttons'
assert 'name=' in html.lower(), 'Radio buttons should share a name attribute'
assert 'type="submit"' in html.lower() or "type='submit'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain a submit button'
hints: A <select> contains multiple <option> tags for the dropdown choices.
Radio buttons with the same name attribute form a group where only one can be selected.

challenges.title: Advanced Form with Fieldset and Datalist
challenges.description: Create a form with a <fieldset> and <legend>, at least three checkboxes, a <select> dropdown, and an <input> with a <datalist> providing autocomplete suggestions. Include a submit button. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create an advanced form with fieldset, checkboxes, select, and datalist -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '<form' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <form> tag'
assert '<fieldset>' in html.lower() or '<fieldset ' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <fieldset> element'
assert '</fieldset>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </fieldset> tag'
assert '<legend>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <legend> element'
assert '</legend>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </legend> tag'
assert 'type="checkbox"' in html.lower() or "type='checkbox'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain checkbox inputs'
assert html.lower().count('type="checkbox"') + html.lower().count("type='checkbox'") >= 3, 'Should contain at least three checkboxes'
assert '<select' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <select> dropdown'
assert '<datalist' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <datalist> element'
assert '</datalist>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </datalist> tag'
assert 'list=' in html.lower(), 'Input should reference the datalist via the list attribute'
assert 'type="submit"' in html.lower() or "type='submit'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain a submit button'
hints: <fieldset> groups related form controls and <legend> provides a caption for the group.
Connect an <input> to a <datalist> using: <input list="mylist"> and <datalist id="mylist">.
